name: Yum Hoi Mang-pu - Thai Mussel Salad.
recipeInstructions:
1. Select only good quality, plump, fresh mussels and shell them.
2. Place the raw mussels in a strainer and drain well.
3. Wash lemongrass stalks, discard leaves and woody top portion, and slice into fine rings.
4. Peel shallots and slice finely.
5. Wash mint leaves and keep whole.
6. Wash hot fresh Thai chili peppers (or use milder chilies) and crush lightly with a heavy object or flat of a knife.
7. Bring water to a boil and blanch the mussels in a strainer, quickly for a short time.
8. Remove from boiling water and place in a bowl; let cool.
9. Add lime juice and fish sauce, mixing well.
10. Stir in sliced lemongrass, shallots, crushed chili peppers, and mint leaves.
11. Serve on a platter lined with lettuce leaves; garnish with extra mint and mild red chili pepper slices.
12. Place any remaining lettuce leaves alongside for serving.
Translated by Padej Gajajiva from "Homemaker - Book 2" by Ponsee Gajajiva.
